findings.message: 47 of 57 requirements not referenced by any ADR. Referenced by ADR-001: BR-003, BR-007, FR-010, NFR-A-001, NFR-C-002, NFR-M-001, NFR-P-001, NFR-Q-003, NFR-S-002, NFR-SEC-001. Examples of orphaned: BR-001, BR-002, BR-004, BR-005, BR-006
findings.action: Review whether these requirements need architectural decisions documented as ADRs
